title: Durable Long-Running Work and Operations · Control-Loop Lens: Versioned Runbooks
summary: Operate a multi-hour or multi-day agent task through interruptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the loops versioned runbooks increment in a durable runbook and restartable workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Version runbooks, tools, schemas, and migration rules for in-flight work.
Wait or subscribe for expected external changes without classifying unchanged state as failure.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
